hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE" in *src/lib/*.js) echo '[hook] src/lib changed: this logic is ALSO inlined in full.liquid or the .gs. Update the matching inline copy and keep it behavior-identical (see ADR 0006).' ;; *full.liquid) echo '[hook] full.liquid changed: if you touched a pure helper, update the matching src/lib/*.js and its test too (ADR 0006).' ;; *.gs) echo '[hook] .gs changed: if you touched cleanText/cacheKey/forecastUrl, update src/lib/middleware.js and its test too (ADR 0006), and bump MIDDLEWARE_VERSION.' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE" in *src/lib/*.js) echo '[hook] Logic changed. Run: bun test . (or the validate agent) before opening a PR.' ;; esac
